label: Administrative Fine for Essential Entities — Higher Tier
description: Maximum administrative fine of at least €10,000,000 or at least 2% of total worldwide annual turnover in the preceding financial year (whichever is higher) for essential entities infringing Articles 21 or 23.
amount_or_description: At least €10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover (whichever is higher)

label: Administrative Fine for Important Entities — Lower Tier
description: Maximum administrative fine of at least €7,000,000 or at least 1.4% of total worldwide annual turnover in the preceding financial year (whichever is higher) for important entities infringing Articles 21 or 23.
amount_or_description: At least €7,000,000 or 1.4% of total worldwide annual turnover (whichever is higher)

label: Personal Liability of Management Body Members
description: Member States shall ensure that natural persons who are members of the management body of essential or important entities can be held personally liable for infringements. Where an essential entity infringes Articles 21 or 23, Member States shall ensure measures including temporary prohibition from exercising managerial functions can be applied to natural persons responsible for the infringement.
amount_or_description: Temporary prohibition from exercising managerial functions at essential entities; personal liability for infringements

label: Publication of Non-Compliance
description: Competent authorities may publicly disclose that an entity is not complying with its obligations under this Directive, where this is considered necessary and proportionate.
amount_or_description: Public disclosure of non-compliance; identification of entity and nature of infringement

label: Compliance Order
description: Competent authority may order the entity to bring its behaviour into compliance within a specified period.
amount_or_description: Order to implement required measures within a defined timeframe
